_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify the need, scope, and timeframe for applicable intelligence environment preparation derived production.
reference_document_element_description: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-020 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-010 (AG, cosine: 0.572), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.552).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.524). Shared vocabulary: [production]. DCWF-only terms [applicable, derived, environment, identify, intelligence, need] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.871, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Identify the need, scope, and timeframe for applicable intelligence environment" and "Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.600 > STS 0.524 (gap +0.076). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [production] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [production]. DCWF-only: [applicable, derived, environment, identify, intelligence, need]. WIDAI-only: [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts].
